title: Purely Citrusy Indian Kiwifruit Jalebi
description: A pescatarian-friendly Indian dish featuring kiwifruit, with a citrusy and molten twist, served as a solo dinner option. This Andhra-style jalebi is steamed in a leaf wrap for a unique flavor.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, ghee, orange juice, lemon juice, turmeric, and salt to form a smooth batter.
Add the chopped kiwifruit to the batter and mix well.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and pour a small amount of the batter to form a jalebi shape.
Cook the jalebi for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Place a cooked jalebi on a banana leaf and fold the leaf to form a packet.
Steam the jalebi packets for 5 minutes, until the leaf is tender.
Serve the jalebi hot with a sprinkle of salt and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Repeat the process with the remaining batter and kiwifruit.
Garnish with additional kiwifruit slices, if desired.
